name: FuzeFront app-shell-platform
description: Serves FuzeFront's shared application layer — the runtime Module-Federation host shell that consumer products mount into, plus shared authentication, app registration/discovery, health/heartbeat, and the cross-app shell surface (navigation, app launcher, theming). A caller asks it to accomplish an app-platform outcome — e.g. register or resolve a product's remote micro-frontend, expose or query a shared shell capability, or check a mounted app's health — and it returns the result. It holds its own tooling and credentials and returns outcomes, never how they were produced.

examples: Register a product's remote micro-frontend so the host shell can load it at runtime.
Resolve the currently discoverable apps and their health status from the app registry.
Expose a shared shell capability (navigation entry, app-launcher tile) for a consumer product.
Report whether a given mounted micro-frontend is healthy according to its heartbeat.

metadata.note: Starter serving role establishing FuzeFront as an A2A tenant; card SHAPE only. Real skill capability (backing each example with an actual served action) is a follow-up owned by backend-engineer/a2a-maintainer.
